objective: Cycle 97 — C127: mg_equilibre + mg_combat_rituel display/score formula fixes

bugs_fixed: C127/EQ-FORMULA-01 (HIGH): mg_equilibre canvas score display used elapsedTime (RAF-accumulated ~60fps) but endGame uses totalTime-timeLeft (interval-tracked ~10fps). At tier 3 (7s), divergence up to 0.5s = proportionally large gap. Fix: canvas display now uses Math.min(totalTime, totalTime-timeLeft+0.001) — same denominator as endGame() and setInterval DOM status. All 3 formula paths now unified.

C127/COMB-FORMULA-01 (HIGH): mg_combat_rituel showed raw seconds ('Survie: 10.0s | Centre: 3.2s') — implied full score but actual formula is weighted % (survivalTime/totalTime)*80 + (centerTime/totalTime)*20. Gap exceeds 20pts especially at tier 3 (10s total). Fix: live HUD now shows estimated score with component breakdown: 'Score: ~N% (survie X/80, centre Y/20)'.
audit_summary.c127_verdict: CLEAR — 5th and 6th formula-alignment fixes. All 14 minigames now audited. 0 TS errors.
c127_confirmations: mg_equilibre.ts: canvas uses Math.min(totalTime, totalTime-timeLeft+0.001) — matches endGame()
mg_combat_rituel.ts: estSurv=(survivalTime/totalTime)*80, estCtr=(centerTime/totalTime)*20, shows total + breakdown
Build: main=52.10KB gzip, minigames=25.48KB gzip (+0.03KB). 0 TS errors.
